message:
feat: LISR-5/6 complete — proof pipeline + overlay deployment control plane

LISR-5.2/5.3/5.4: Capability monotonicity, hostcall parity, conformance
replay, golden checksums, and unified VerificationBundle activation gate.

LISR-6.1: Overlay artifact format with lifecycle states (Staged→Canary→
Stable→RolledBack/Superseded) and validated state transitions.

LISR-6.2: Per-extension canary routing with deterministic SHA-256 hash
buckets and configurable overlay percentage.

LISR-6.3: Health/SLO monitors with automatic rollback triggers when
signals exceed thresholds.

LISR-6.4: Promotion and deterministic rollback workflow with
decide_promotion() decision engine.

296 tests passing, zero clippy warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
